Multi-class Probabilistic Active Learning#

 9 import numpy as np
10 from matplotlib import pyplot as plt, animation
11 from sklearn.datasets import make_blobs
12
13 from skactiveml.utils import MISSING_LABEL, labeled_indices
14 from skactiveml.visualization import plot_utilities, plot_decision_boundary
15
16 from skactiveml.pool import ProbabilisticAL
17 from skactiveml.classifier import ParzenWindowClassifier
18
19 random_state = np.random.RandomState(0)
20
21 # Build a dataset.
22 X, y_true = make_blobs(n_samples=100, n_features=2,
23                        centers=[[0, 1], [-3, .5], [-1, -1], [2, 1], [1, -.5]],
24                        cluster_std=.7, random_state=random_state)
25 y_true = y_true % 2
26 y = np.full(shape=y_true.shape, fill_value=MISSING_LABEL)
27
28 # Initialise the classifier.
29 clf = ParzenWindowClassifier(classes=[0, 1], random_state=random_state)
30 # Initialise the query strategy.
31 qs = ProbabilisticAL(random_state=random_state)
32 dens_est = clf.fit(X, np.zeros(len(X)))
33 dens = clf.predict_freq(X)[:,0]
34
35 # Preparation for plotting.
36 fig, ax = plt.subplots()
37 feature_bound = [[min(X[:, 0]), min(X[:, 1])], [max(X[:, 0]), max(X[:, 1])]]
38 artists = []
39
40 # The active learning cycle:
41 n_cycles = 25
42 for c in range(n_cycles):
43     # Fit the classifier.
44     clf.fit(X, y)
45
46     # Get labeled instances.
47     X_labeled = X[labeled_indices(y)]
48
49     # Query the next instance/s.
50     query_params = {"clf": clf, "utility_weight": dens}
51     query_idx = qs.query(X=X, y=y, **query_params)
52
53     # Plot the labeled data.
54     coll_old = list(ax.collections)
55     title = ax.text(
56         0.5, 1.05, f"Decision boundary after acquring {c} labels",
57         size=plt.rcParams["axes.titlesize"], ha="center",
58         transform=ax.transAxes
59     )
60     ax = plot_utilities(qs, X=X, y=y, candidates=None,
61                         **query_params,
62                         res=21, feature_bound=feature_bound, ax=ax)
63     ax.scatter(X[:, 0], X[:, 1], c=y_true, cmap="coolwarm", marker=".",
64                zorder=2)
65     ax.scatter(X_labeled[:, 0], X_labeled[:, 1], c="grey", alpha=.8,
66                marker=".", s=300)
67     ax = plot_decision_boundary(clf, feature_bound, ax=ax)
68
69     coll_new = list(ax.collections)
70     coll_new.append(title)
71     artists.append([x for x in coll_new if (x not in coll_old)])
72
73     # Label the queried instances.
74     y[query_idx] = y_true[query_idx]
75
76 ani = animation.ArtistAnimation(fig, artists, interval=1000, blit=True)

References:

The implementation of this strategy is based on Kottke et al.1.

1

Daniel Kottke, Georg Krempl, Dominik Lang, Johannes Teschner, and Myra Spiliopoulou. Multi-class probabilistic active learning. In Proceedings of the European Conference on Artificial Intelligence, volume 285, 586–594. IOS Press, 2016.
